programme.title: Darr@the Mall
programme.desc: Asia's largest mall is ready for inauguration, although there's a myth about the mall. Because of 9 accidental deaths in the mall and the owners are sick of the stories about the mall being haunted.

programme.title: Lanka
programme.desc: Jaswant, an influential gangster, loves his mistress but keeps her captive and refuses to marry her. However, his most-trusted protege decides to go against him and plans to free her.

programme.title: The Making - Soorma
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Junooniyat
programme.desc: Suhani, a Punjabi woman, falls in love with a passionate army officer, Captain Jahan Bakshi, to her father's dismay. She decides to elope but soon falls prey to a misunderstanding about Jahan.

programme.title: Naani Maa
programme.desc: Santosh decides to keep his grandmother Sita Mahalakshmi happy at any cost because she helped him in a game of hide and seek during his childhood.

programme.title: SIMRAN
programme.desc: Praful, a divorcee, loses her savings in a gambling bout. She takes a loan in order to repair the damage but when she is unable to repay it, she finds herself drawn into a life of crime.

programme.title: Funhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: The show is a sketch comedy spoofing or taking bizarre perspectives of national or international events capturing the attention of the public

programme.title: Funhit Mein Jaari
programme.desc: The show is a sketch comedy spoofing or taking bizarre perspectives of national or international events capturing the attention of the public

programme.title: TUMHARI SULU
programme.desc: Vidya Balan (Sulu) essays the role of a beautiful, enthusiastic Mumbai housewife whose routine life changes when she unexpectedly lands herself with the job of a night RJ on a leading radio station.

programme.title: Heropanti
programme.desc: A man loves a woman, who's family does not believe in love.

programme.title: Madam Geeta Rani
programme.desc: Geetha Rani implements different plans to reform an undisciplined government school. However, she faces numerous challenges in her way, including a corrupt MLA.

programme.title: Street Dancer 3
programme.desc: A dance epic based on the multifarious colors of dance and the unity that occurs between two different groups coming together for a single cause.

programme.title: The Making: Abcd 2
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Swapna, a game designer, has post-traumatic stress disorder and a chronic fear of the dark. Her life turns upside down after a serial killer enters her house and creates havoc.

programme.title: Gulabo Sitabo
programme.desc: Two scheming men get caught up in a game of one-up-manship, each one attracting other members to their clan and each one with an agenda of his own.

programme.title: The Making - Hichki
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Chennai Central
programme.desc: A proficient carrom player sets foot in the world of crime and joins forces with local gangsters to settle their feuds. However, he decides to take them down when they plan to wipe out his locality

programme.title: Hindi Medium
programme.desc: Raj and Mita Batra yearn to get Pia, their daughter, educated from a posh school. When they learn that their background is holding her back, they are willing to go to any lengths to change her fate.

programme.title: The Making - Chef
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Nawabzaade
programme.desc: When three best friends fall in love with the same girl, their friendship is challenged. However, they soon realize that there is more to her than her looks.

programme.title: Jab Tak Hai Jaan
programme.desc: An emotionally damaged Shahrukh Khan tries to forget the past so he can find true love in Yash Chopra's final film before his death. Also starring Katrina Kaif and Anushka Sharma.

programme.title: Setters
programme.desc: Apurva Chaudhary and his team leak several examination papers and make huge profits out of it. Meanwhile, Aditya Singh and his team of honest officers attempt to catch the criminals.

programme.title: Dostana
programme.desc: Two straight guys pretend to be gay in order to secure a Miami apartment. Both of them fall in love with their roommate Neha, hilarity ensues as they strive to convince one that they're gay.

programme.title: Arjun Ki Dulhaniya
programme.desc: Even though Arjun has no intentions of getting married, his parents set up a blind date with a girl. He falls in love with her, but soon, circumstances make him change his mind regarding marriage.

programme.title: Ghatak - Lethal
programme.desc: When Kashi visits a community with his father, he is shocked to see the torturous regime of Katya. He tries to oppose Katya, but ends up compromising the safety of his family and relatives.

programme.title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
programme.desc: Vidya Balan is the single mother who finds solace with Emraan Hashmi's wealthy, but lonely hotel magnate. Together they find love until her past comes back to confront her. .

programme.title: The Making Bhoomi
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dear Comrade
programme.desc: Bobby, a hot-headed student union leader, falls in love with Lily, a state-level cricketer. But soon his anger issues become a roadblock on his way to unite with Lily.

programme.title: Katti Batti
programme.desc: A romantic comedy that follows Maddy and Payal's live-in relationship until a sudden turn of events creates a distance between them.

programme.title: Mujhse Shaadi Karogi
programme.desc: Sameer, fast at losing his temper is re-located to Goa where he falls in love with Rani. But Sameer's new roommate Sunny, has some plans of his own.

programme.title: Mission Kashmir
programme.desc: A police officer adopts the son and sole survivor of a family he has massacred while pursuing a terrorist. After some time the foster son finds out what the stepfather did.

programme.title: Batla House
programme.desc: Police conduct a raid on a house in Delhi, India, to search for terrorist suspects.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: Hrithik Roshan begins his adventures with the origins of the superhero Krrish. Eye-popping action adventure with Priyanka Chopra.

programme.title: The Making: Tumhari Sulu
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Bahubali: The Beginning
programme.desc: In the kingdom of Mahishmati, while pursuing his love, Shivudu learns about the conflict-ridden past of his family and his legacy. He must now prepare himself to face his new-found archenemy.

programme.title: Mardaani
programme.desc: A cop's search for a missing teenage girl leads her to the depraved world of child trafficking. What follows is a cat-and-mouse game between the fearless cop and a ruthless mafia kingpin.

programme.title: FILMISTAAN
programme.desc: An aspiring actor and diehard fan of Bollywood movies is kidnapped and held in the home of a Pakistani who deals in pirated Hindi films.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: DEDH ISHQIYA
programme.desc: Comedy thriller. Out from jail, Khalujaan and Babban steal a necklace made with royal jewels.

programme.title: The Making Of Dum Laga Ke
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Malang
programme.desc: Advait visits Goa where he meets Sara, a free-spirited girl who lives life unshackled. Opposites attract and all goes well until life turns upside down

programme.title: Aaja Nachle
programme.desc: A New York dance instructor returns to her home village in India after 11 years to find that the arts centre where she learned her craft is to be demolished and replaced with a shopping mall.

programme.title: Ahishta Ahishta
programme.desc: This story is woven around aimless youth who scrapes a living by acting as a witness in Delhi's marriage registrar bureau and a girl who has run away from her home in Nainital, to get married.

programme.title: Bachna Aaye Haseeno
programme.desc: This is a story about Raj Sharma who meets three young women at different stages in his life and runs from one conquest to another only to crash into true love.

programme.title: The Making Of Fan
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Rocky Handsome
programme.desc: John Abraham plays reclusive pawn shop owner who sets his sights on revenge when vicious gangsters kidnap his drug-addicted neighbours daughter. Heart-stopping action adventure.

programme.title: CITY LIGHTS
programme.desc: A farmer from Rajasthan. After a tragedy, he migrates to Mumbai with his wife and child to lead a better life. However, upon arriving, he soon discovers the challenges of life in a big city.

programme.title: Marjaavan
programme.desc: Young couple Raghu and Zoya enjoy their lives together until a vertically challenged gang leader with harmful intentions turns their world upside down.

programme.title: The Making- Tiger Zinda Hai
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Heart Attack 3
programme.desc: A man falls head over heels in love with a woman and takes on a new identity in an attempt to impress her. Along the way, he also seeks the help of her dog to try and win her over.

programme.title: Neal And Nikki
programme.desc: Neal n Nikki is the story of two Indians, born and bred in Canada. It is the story of a journey that changes their lives forever.

programme.title: Piku
programme.desc: Critically acclaimed comedy about the relationship between a daughter (Deepika Padukone) and her aging father (Amitabh Bachchan), whose eccentricities drive everyone crazy.

programme.title: Jalebi
programme.desc: A woman boards an overnight train and gets placed in a compartment with her former lover and his wife.

programme.title: Andaz Apna Apna
programme.desc: Amar and Prem, who belong to middle-class families, compete to win over Raveena, a millionaire's daughter. Along the way, they run into a local gangster, Teja, who turns their lives upside down.

programme.title: SALAAM NAMASTE
programme.desc: Salaam Namaste is about two Indians who have left their houses to make a life on their own.

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: Raju, a waiter, is crazy about TV reporter, Geeta. During an investigation, in order to prolong their meetings, he bears false witness to a murder and misleads the police with a fake description.

programme.title: Lajja
programme.desc: The journeys of four different women who are all victims of male chauvinism are brought together due to common circumstances. However, they refuse to get abused and decide to fight for their rights.

programme.title: Maari
programme.desc: Maari, a fun-loving rowdy, creates many enemies in his area due to his arrogant but righteous behaviour. Beeja, a dreaded gangster, vows to seek revenge against Maari for killing his brother.

programme.title: Jab Tak Hai Jaan
programme.desc: An emotionally damaged Shahrukh Khan tries to forget the past so he can find true love in Yash Chopra's final film before his death. Also starring Katrina Kaif and Anushka Sharma.

programme.title: The Making - Sui Dhaaga
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dostana
programme.desc: Two straight guys pretend to be gay in order to secure a Miami apartment. Both of them fall in love with their roommate Neha, hilarity ensues as they strive to convince one that they're gay.

programme.title: Bank Chor
programme.desc: Bank Chor is the story of 3 people trying to rob a bank who pick the worst day possible when everything that can go wrong and how they are inadvertently caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Yeh Raaste Hain Pyar Ke
programme.desc: When Rohit, Vicky's look-alike, is accidentally killed by Bhanwarlal, Vicky impersonates Rohit and stays with his family. Little does he know that his father already knows about Rohit's death.

programme.title: Parineeta
programme.desc: The lifelong romance between Lolita (Vidya Balan) and Shekar (Saif Ali Khan) is upset by the arrival of another man.

programme.title: Ek Ladki Ko Dekha Toh Aisa Laga
programme.desc: A young woman must contend with a family that wants her to get married, a writer who is completely smitten with her, and a secret that she harbors close to her heart.

programme.title: Do Dilon Ke Khel Mein
programme.desc: Rohit and Isha happen to meet and take an intense dislike towards each other. When they realise that their parents, who are old friends, have decided to get them married, they start rebelling.

programme.title: Heropanti
programme.desc: A man loves a woman, who's family does not believe in love.

programme.title: Run Raja Run
programme.desc: Raja, son of a vegetable vendor, is a simple man. His girlfriends dump him because of his honesty. However, things take a turn when he meets his true love Priya, the daughter of a police commissioner.

programme.title: Mission Kashmir
programme.desc: A police officer adopts the son and sole survivor of a family he has massacred while pursuing a terrorist. After some time the foster son finds out what the stepfather did.

programme.title: The Making Of Dum Laga Ke
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: SALAAM NAMASTE
programme.desc: Salaam Namaste is about two Indians who have left their houses to make a life on their own.

programme.title: Meri Pyaari Bindu
programme.desc: Childhood friends Abhimanyu and Bindu face friction when she realises that she doesn't love him after a brief relationship. Years later, Abhimanyu decides to pen a story based on his life.

programme.title: Pyar Mein Twist
programme.desc: With their respective children's' marriages about to take place, two middle-aged single parents fall in love.

programme.title: Laaga Chunari Main Daag
programme.desc: A woman sacrifices her own happiness and reputation to financially support her family by working as a call girl.

programme.title: Paathshaala
programme.desc: Rahul joins a Mumbai school as a teacher and strikes a rapport with the kids. But he soon realises that the management is more concerned about monetary obligations rather than the children.

programme.title: Bachna Aaye Haseeno
programme.desc: This is a story about Raj Sharma who meets three young women at different stages in his life and runs from one conquest to another only to crash into true love.

programme.title: Setters
programme.desc: Apurva Chaudhary and his team leak several examination papers and make huge profits out of it. Meanwhile, Aditya Singh and his team of honest officers attempt to catch the criminals.

programme.title: CHEF
programme.desc: When he loses his job, Roshan, a chef decides to spend time with his son who lives with his ex-wife. While doing so, she suggests him a business idea which he then begins to pursue.

programme.title: Comali
programme.desc: Ravi awakens from a prolonged coma to learn that he is in his 30s and has missed 16 years of his life. Soon, he struggles to cope with the modern world and its innovations.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: Hrithik Roshan begins his adventures with the origins of the superhero Krrish. Eye-popping action adventure with Priyanka Chopra.

programme.title: Pyaar Impossible
programme.desc: The first time around, Abhay was too geeky for Alisha, the girl he secretly loved. Seven years later, she is a single mother and he is forced to become her kids' nanny. Will cupid succeed this time?

programme.title: Shuddh Desi Romance
programme.desc: Story of a generation of young boys and girls who stay away from home, date and almost get married. They have decided their own rights and wrongs and they may not be the same as others.

programme.title: Ta Ra Rum Pum
programme.desc: This is the story of one man, his family and how they overcome the obstacles that life puts in their way

programme.title: Dilwale
programme.desc: Raj and Meera fall in love, but are forced to stay away from each other as they belong to rival mafia families. Years later, they get a second chance when their siblings fall for each other.

programme.title: Aakhri Baazi
programme.desc: A man decides to avenge the death of his friend by hunting down the culprits, but is in for a big shock when the evidence points towards none other than his own brother.

programme.title: Batla House
programme.desc: Police conduct a raid on a house in Delhi, India, to search for terrorist suspects.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Jalebi
programme.desc: A woman boards an overnight train and gets placed in a compartment with her former lover and his wife.

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.title: MUBARAKAN
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers turn to their eccentric uncle for help to make sure that they each marry the woman they love.

programme.title: Bunty Aur Babli
programme.desc: Two mismatched characters go on a wild road trip in Uttar Pradesh and, while being dogged by a policeman, fall in love.

programme.title: Ladies Vs Ricky Bahl
programme.desc: It is a story about a con-man who earns his bread and butter by conning women but at the end gets conned himself.

programme.title: Dhoom 2
programme.desc: Abhishek Bachchan and Uday Chopra return, this time on the trail of International thief Hrithik Roshan. Star studded sequel also starring Aishwarya Rai and Bipasha Basu.

programme.title: Befikre
programme.desc: Two commitment-phobic individuals enter into a casual relationship that turns out to be fraught with more emotion than they can handle. They drift apart, only to be drawn back together.

programme.title: Ahishta Ahishta
programme.desc: This story is woven around aimless youth who scrapes a living by acting as a witness in Delhi's marriage registrar bureau and a girl who has run away from her home in Nainital, to get married.

programme.title: Hate Story 4
programme.desc: Aryan and Rajveer, sons of a wealthy businessman and politician, Vikram Khurana, fall in love with the same woman, Tasha. Problems arise when they get entangled in a revengeful plan.

programme.title: Bank Chor
programme.desc: Bank Chor is the story of 3 people trying to rob a bank who pick the worst day possible when everything that can go wrong and how they are inadvertently caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Shikara
programme.desc: This story is about mass evacuation of Kashmiri Pandits in 1990, the story traces the life of newlyweds, who flee their homeland and take refuge at a camp in Jammu, with a promise to return home

programme.title: 3 Idiots
programme.desc: Two friends search for their long lost college friend and genius "Rancho" played by Aamir Khan with hilarious consequences. Award winning movie from director Rajkumar Hirani.

programme.title: Sonu Ke Titu Ki Sweety
programme.desc: Titu is going to marry a perfect woman named Sweety. Titu's best-friend Sonu doubts Sweety's character and tries to break the marriage while Sweety tries to do opposite and it creates romantic comedy.

programme.title: Sultan
programme.desc: Salman Khan stars as the wrestler looking for a comeback with the help of Anushka Sharma. Classic box office topping underdog tale.

programme.title: Pati Patni Aur Woh - 2019
programme.desc: Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman.

programme.title: Section 375
programme.desc: A filmmaker stands trial when a costume assistant on his movie accuses him of rape.

programme.title: Andaz Apna Apna
programme.desc: Amar and Prem, who belong to middle-class families, compete to win over Raveena, a millionaire's daughter. Along the way, they run into a local gangster, Teja, who turns their lives upside down.
